spring-boot-mongo/src/test/java/de/codec.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations and runner with JUnit 5 equivalents to align with Spring Boot 4's default testing framework.
spring-boot-mongo/src/test/java/de/codec.human_impl: Replaced 'import org.junit.Test' with 'import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test' and removed '@RunWith(SpringRunner.class)' and related imports.

springdata-jpa/src/main/java/jpa/domain/.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from the javax.persistence package to the jakarta.persistence package to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.

springdata-jpa/src/main/java/jpa/repo/Cl.general_idea: Migrated persistence annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 4.

springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations and runner with JUnit 5 equivalents to align with modern testing standards.
Update Spring Test context configuration to use the JUnit 5 extension instead of the JUnit 4 runner.
Replace deprecated PageRequest constructor with the static factory method PageRequest.of().
Replace deprecated Sort constructor with the static factory method Sort.by() and fluent order builders.
Update static import for assertThat to use the explicit MatcherAssert class for clarity.
springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.human_impl: import static org.junit.Assert.assertThat; -> import static org.hamcrest.MatcherAssert.assertThat;

springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/dom.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Data Neo4j OGM annotations with the new Spring Data Neo4j 6+ schema annotations.
Switch from @GraphId to @Id and @GeneratedValue to align with the new SDN 6 identity management.
Remove the @Index annotation as indexing is now handled via schema definitions or repository methods in SDN 6.
Change relationship type string to uppercase to follow Neo4j convention.
Use diamond operator for generic type instantiation.
Consolidate getter and setter methods into single-line format for brevity.

springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Replaced deprecated GraphRepository with Neo4jRepository to align with Spring Data Neo4j 6+ API.
Updated import for @Query annotation to the new package location in Spring Data Neo4j 6+.
Rewrote Cypher query from legacy START/MATCH syntax to modern pattern matching syntax.

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations and assertions with JUnit 5 equivalents to align with modern testing standards.
Switch from Spring's JUnit 4 runner to the JUnit 5 extension for test context management.
Replace deprecated Neo4j OGM template API with the newer Neo4jClient API for query execution.
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.human_impl: neo4jClient.query("CREATE INDEX ... IF NOT EXISTS ... FOR (u:User) ON (u.login)").run();

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Adapt repository method calls to use Optional return types introduced in newer Spring Data versions.
Update assertion calls to use the message-as-last-argument style preferred by JUnit 5.
Remove unnecessary debug print statements and helper methods from the test class.
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.human_impl: removed out("Root id: " + rootId); and private static void out(Object o)

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Remove outdated TODO comments and inline documentation that are no longer relevant.
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.human_impl: removed // TODO fixme ... and // when / // then comments

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Migrate from the deprecated Neo4j OGM (Object-Graph Mapper) to the native Bolt driver for database connectivity.
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.human_impl: Replaced `extends Neo4jConfiguration` with `extends AbstractNeo4jConfig` and swapped `SessionFactory`/`Neo4jServer` beans for a `Driver` bean using `GraphDatabase.driver`.

springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Str.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 static assertion imports with JUnit 5 equivalents.
Replace JUnit 4 lifecycle and test annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents.
Replace JUnit 4 runner annotation with JUnit 5 extension annotation for Spring integration.
Adjust argument order in assertions to match JUnit 5 API signature requirements.

springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Use.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 static assertions with JUnit 5 equivalents.
Replace JUnit 4 lifecycle annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents.
Replace JUnit 4 runner annotation with JUnit 5 extension annotation.
Adjust assertEquals arguments to match JUnit 5 signature (expected, actual, message).
Adjust assertNotNull arguments to match JUnit 5 signature (actual, message).
Correct the error message string for fullName assertion to match the field name.
Remove trailing whitespace and normalize indentation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Adopt Spring Boot 4 starter parent to manage dependencies and build configuration for the new framework version.
Define the target Java version as 21 in project properties to align with the migration goal.
Explicitly configure the Maven compiler plugin to use Java 21 source and target levels.
Include the new dedicated MongoDB driver module in the multi-module build structure.

spring-boot-mongo/pom.xml.general_idea: Switched the project parent from spring-boot-starter-parent to a custom internal parent POM to centralize dependency management.
Renamed the Maven artifact ID from 'mongoboot' to 'spring-boot-mongo' to align with the directory name and project identity.
Updated the project name and description for clarity and consistency.
Removed the explicit java.version property, likely relying on the new parent POM or build tool defaults for Java 21 compatibility.
Added a property to manage the version of the docker-maven-plugin.
Added the Spring Boot Actuator starter dependency to enable production-ready features like health checks and metrics.
Added a Maven profile to configure the docker-maven-plugin for building Docker images, gated behind a 'docker' profile.
